staticText: Deterministic local profit-margin methodology. Gross margin is (revenue minus COGS) divided by revenue. Operating margin also subtracts user-entered operating expenses. Net margin also subtracts user-entered interest, tax and other expenses. Markup is gross profit divided by COGS and is undefined when COGS is zero. Require revenue greater than zero, allow non-negative expenses and valid negative profit or margin results, and never supply a tax rate, import duty, exchange rate, industry benchmark, target margin, price recommendation or cost-reduction recommendation.
